objective: TEMPLATE — describe the MVP objective in one sentence. Copy this file to mvp-1.json (gitignored) and edit it; this mvp-example.json is the reference template and the only versioned roadmap file. `/project-setup` generates real mvp-*.json files for you.

included: feature A included in this MVP
excluded: feature deferred to a later MVP

openQuestions.question: Example blocking decision the human must make before/while this MVP is built.
openQuestions.why: What is ambiguous or breaks without an answer.

openQuestions.question: Example fine-grained decision the agent can default but should surface.
openQuestions.why: Why it matters to get right eventually.

verify.desc: What behavior the unit test validates.

tasks.desc: UI task with end-to-end verification (note the designRef on UI tasks).

verify.desc: What UI/API flow the e2e validates, incl. concrete visual acceptance (empty/loading/error states, responsive, reduced-motion).

tasks.desc: Task with no automated test (requires human confirmation).

verify.desc: Human-readable acceptance criterion the human confirms by hand.
